description: Composition Grey capris made of 98% cotton and 12% elastane, with flattened seams, broad elasticated waistband, button and zipper closure, two side pockets, , tapering hemline with elasticated hems and a patch pocket at the back Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in cool water Do not bleach Tumble dry at low temperature Warm iron Do not dry clean Chill out in these comfy capris from puma. The soft and broad elasticated waistband sits snug around your waist, while the harem silhouette flatters your figure. These cotton capris stretch and move with your body, offering comfort during your training sessions. Team it with an urban yoga T-shirt and fitness shoes. Model statistics Product is a size 34 on a model of height 6' and waist 26"
